enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep affection and the beauty of love, highlighting the emotional connection between the lovers.

What is the plot context of the movie?

Azhagu Kutti Chellam revolves around themes of love and relationships, showcasing the journey of its characters through various emotional landscapes.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Balram, known for his melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Azhagu Kutti Chellam was composed by Ved Shankar, adding a unique flavor to the track.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 30, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Azhagu Kutti Chellam, the song encapsulates the tender emotions of love, portraying a heartfelt connection between the protagonists. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect romantic ballad. Balram's soothing voice enhances the song's charm, inviting listeners to immerse themselves in its melodic embrace. Overall, the track beautifully conveys the essence of love and longing, resonating with anyone who has experienced such emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhagu Kutti Chellam is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and affection. With Balram's soulful vocals and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song from the film Azhagu Kutti Chellam resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the enchanting vibes that make this track a perfect addition to any romantic playlist.
stanzaMeanings: Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will be fulfilled, my beautiful little one.
What form does God take? I see it in you.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will be fulfilled, my beautiful little one.
Who are you, who are you, I am. You have changed into you.
Who am I, who am I, you said I am.
I am a flower, you are the flower that brings fragrance.
Fragrance is my breath, always you.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will be fulfilled, my beautiful little one.
When I hold you, I feel a little happiness here.
The earth blooms flowers for you. The clouds will rain for you.
I saw the divine playing with the heavenly beings.
The meanings of joy are your kisses, I have become mad with them.
Just hearing your language is enough to remove all my sorrows.
If your feet come home, I will live for you.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will be fulfilled, my beautiful little one.
What form does God take? I see it in you.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will be fulfilled, my beautiful little one.
